content.shortDescription: An exciting inter-team cricket tournament organized by the Department of International Business with cash prizes and trophies.
content.description:
The Department of International Business, Pondicherry University, presents a Cricket Tournament as part of GLOBIZZ’26 celebrations.
The tournament invites teams to compete in a thrilling 10-over format match using a red tennis ball. Attractive cash prizes, trophies, and medals await the winners. The event promises competitive spirit, teamwork, and sportsmanship across two action-packed days.
First Prize: ₹8000 Second Prize: ₹4000 Entry Fee: ₹1000 per team

rules.rule: Red tennis ball will be used
